04 // Hands-On Work

Project Showcase

🔓
DVWA Vulnerability Lab
Conducted hands-on vulnerability testing on the Damn Vulnerable Web Application, identifying and exploiting SQL injection, XSS, brute force, and file upload vulnerabilities across multiple security levels.
Kali Linux Burp Suite OWASP ZAP SQL Injection XSS CSRF
🧃
OWASP Juice Shop Assessment
Identified and exploited vulnerabilities in a real-world web application simulation, gaining practical experience with CSRF, XSS, server-side request forgery, and other OWASP Top 10 attack vectors.
OWASP Top 10 CSRF XSS SSRF Burp Suite
🌐
Network Scanning with Nmap
Conducted extensive network reconnaissance using Nmap to identify open ports, running services, and potential entry points, producing structured vulnerability assessment reports.
Nmap Port Scanning Service Enumeration Reporting
💻
VM Lab & Penetration Testing
Configured and troubleshot virtual machines in VirtualBox running Metasploitable, practicing penetration testing techniques in isolated environments with full documentation of findings.
VirtualBox Metasploitable Kali Linux Hydra
🔒
Cisco Packet Tracer — Network Security Config
Designed and configured secure network topologies in Cisco Packet Tracer, implementing password encryption, access control banners, and hardened router configurations.
Cisco Packet Tracer Router Config IOS CLI Access Control
💧
Brute Force Attack Simulation
Executed a brute force credential attack using Hydra with the rockyou wordlist against a DVWA target, successfully demonstrating weak password vulnerabilities and documenting mitigation strategies.
Hydra Wordlist Attack DVWA Credential Analysis
🔐
UmojaAgri API Security Assessment
Conducted a black box API security assessment on UmojaAgri, a live Nigerian agricultural marketplace platform. Identified 5 vulnerabilities including Verbose Error Disclosure, User Enumeration, missing Rate Limiting, Weak Password Policy, and a hardcoded Role ID in frontend JavaScript. Performed IDOR testing across authentication and financial endpoints and delivered a full security report with recommendations to the development team.
Postman Chrome DevTools JWT.io API Testing IDOR Testing Linux OWASP Top 10
